zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Hill於1254年出生在英國史洛普爾納什時，他的父親Symon de Hill24歲，母親Dionysia de Burford24歲。他和Sarah Ann de Parson至少有1個兒子。他去世於1325年在英國戴文阿可明斯特享年71歲，埋葬在英國戴文霍其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Hill于1254年出生在英国史洛普爾納什时，他的父亲Symon de Hill24岁，母亲Dionysia de Burford24岁。他和Sarah Ann de Parson至少有1个儿子。他去世于1325年在英国戴文阿可明斯特享年71岁，埋葬在英国戴文霍其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Hill was born in 1254, in Nash, Shropshire, England, his father, Symon de Hill, was 24 and his mother, Dionysia de Burford, was 24. He had at least 1 son with Sarah Ann de Parson. He died in 1325, in Axminster, Devon, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Hawkchurch, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Hill est né en 1254, à Nash, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Symon de Hill, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Dionysia de Burford, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sarah Ann de Parson. Il est décédé en 1325, à Axminster, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Hawkchurch, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Hill 1254 in Nash, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Symon de Hill 24 und seine Mutter Dionysia de Burford 24. Er hatte mit Sarah Ann de Parson mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1325 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Axminster, Devon, England und wurde in Hawkchurch, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Hill è nato il nel 1254 nel Nash, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Symon de Hill, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Dionysia de Burford, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sarah Ann de Parson. Morì nel 1325, nel Axminster, Devon, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Hawkchurch, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Hillが1254年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアナッシュで生まれた時，父Symon de Hillは24歳，母Dionysia de Burfordは24歳であった。彼はSarah Ann de Parsonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1325年にイギリスデボンアクスミンスターで71歳で死去し，イギリスデボンハウクチャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Hill(이)가 1254년 영국 슈럽실르 나시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Symon de Hill(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Dionysia de Burford(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Sarah Ann de Parson(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1325년 영국 데폰 액민스터에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 호kc후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Hill nasceu em 1254, em Nash, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Symon de Hill, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Dionysia de Burford, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Sarah Ann de Parson. Ele faleceu em 1325, em Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Hawkchurch, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Hill родился в 1254 г. в местности наш, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Symon de Hill было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Dionysia de Burford, 24. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sarah Ann de Parson. Он умер в 1325 г. в местности аксминстир, девон, Англия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности ховкчурч, девон, Англия.
